problem id: 939273d7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  11100011 -> 10110111
  11010011 -> 10110111
  01100000 -> 11110011
  11001100 -> 10100110
  00100110 -> 01011011
  11000111 -> 01110111
  10011111 -> 11111100
  11001110 -> 11000110

query: 01001111
predicted answer: 11100110
